blended.narrative: Boyne Highlands is looking at a solid round of snow over the next 48 hours, with 12 inches of light, fluffy snow expected. Snow levels around 44 ft. Looking ahead, 39 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 6" of snow, highs of 33°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Sunday: 14" of heavy snow, highs of 26°F. Expect powder.
Monday: 16" of heavy snow, highs of 26°F. Expect powder.
Tuesday: 2.5" of snow, highs of 14°F. Expect powder.
